summary: This process outlines how to add a new item to the inventory system, including entering an item code (optional), selecting an item group, and the ability to create new item groups if needed.
steps: Enter the 'Item Code' (optional; can be used to differentiate similar items, e.g., different types of erasers).
If the required 'Item Group' does not exist, click the provided icon to create a new one.
When creating a new item group, specify if it's 'Primary' or a sub-group (e.g., 'pens' under 'stationary data', then 'ball pens' under 'pens').
business_rules: An 'Item Group' must be selected for each item.
important_notes: Item codes can be useful for distinguishing between variations of the same item.
Item groups can be nested to create a hierarchical categorization (e.g., 'ball pens' and 'gel pens' under 'pens', which is under 'stationary data').
questions: What fields are required when creating a new inventory item?
Can I create a new item group while creating an item?
How do I categorize items using item groups?
Is the item code a mandatory field for new items?
What is the difference between a primary and a sub-group for items?
